raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Is the review intended to be comprehensive (including conceptual reconstruction, novelty assessment, and citations) or focused primarily on logical consistency, evidence alignment, and writing polish?","rationale":{"R1.2":"The delegation to review the section centrally involves verifying the logical consistency of the argument chain from premises to conclusions.","R1.3":"Reviewing requires checking if the reported claims align with the presented evidence such as AUROC scores and ECE metrics.","R1.4":"The section makes novelty claims against prior work, so assessing the delta is a central expected responsibility in the review.","R1.6":"Polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is a key part of reviewing a paper section.","R1.7":"Evaluating citation accuracy and literature coverage is central to reviewing the scholarship in this section.","RX.1":"The artifact focuses on uncertainty modeling, so the review should centrally ensure proper disclosure of uncertainties in claims.","RX.2":"Reviewing involves checking for overclaims in the improvements and novelty statements to avoid exaggeration.","RX.3":"The review must ensure the section adheres to its scope of calibrated pathogenicity prediction without overreaching.","RX.4":"Given the clinical genetics context, the review should centrally avoid promoting downstream harms in variant triage applications.","RX.5":"Ensuring provenance and traceability of results and citations is a cross-cutting responsibility in reviewing the artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Is the review intended to be comprehensive (including conceptual reconstruction, novelty assessment, and citations) or focused primarily on logical consistency, evidence alignment, and writing polish?

rationale.R1.2: The delegation to review the section centrally involves verifying the logical consistency of the argument chain from premises to conclusions.
rationale.R1.3: Reviewing requires checking if the reported claims align with the presented evidence such as AUROC scores and ECE metrics.
rationale.R1.4: The section makes novelty claims against prior work, so assessing the delta is a central expected responsibility in the review.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is a key part of reviewing a paper section.
rationale.R1.7: Evaluating citation accuracy and literature coverage is central to reviewing the scholarship in this section.
rationale.RX.1: The artifact focuses on uncertainty modeling, so the review should centrally ensure proper disclosure of uncertainties in claims.
rationale.RX.2: Reviewing involves checking for overclaims in the improvements and novelty statements to avoid exaggeration.
rationale.RX.3: The review must ensure the section adheres to its scope of calibrated pathogenicity prediction without overreaching.
rationale.RX.4: Given the clinical genetics context, the review should centrally avoid promoting downstream harms in variant triage applications.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance and traceability of results and citations is a cross-cutting responsibility in reviewing the artifact.
